name: Can I sue the machine maker if it malfunctioned at work?
description: Yes, third-party suit against manufacturer possible alongside comp[2][4].

mainEntity.name: Can I sue the machine maker if it malfunctioned at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, third-party suit against manufacturer possible alongside comp[2][4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, via third-party claim beyond workers comp if manufacturer negligent.** Workers comp is exclusive vs employer, but sue equipment makers for defects[2][4]. Idaho allows if not employer[2]. **Key factors:** Prove fault; 2-year limit in Idaho. **Practical guidance:** Notify attorney fast; comp pays first, sue for more. Common in construction/machinery cases.
